session.summary: Hybrid memory architecture formalized with canonical Markdown, JSON session sidecars, and an idempotent projector for the derived Docker MCP graph.

decisions.summary: Markdown remains the canonical ledger, JSON sidecars become the canonical machine write path, and the Docker MCP graph remains derived.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the memory lane auditable in Git, portable across providers, and recoverable when Docker MCP is stale or unavailable.

decisions.summary: The projector talks to the MCP gateway over stdio JSON-RPC instead of relying on brittle shell serialization for create_entities.
decisions.rationale: The CLI path already showed instability for complex array payloads, so the projector needs a deterministic transport.

decisions.summary: Historical session reports are imported into partial sidecars before graph projection, preserving provenance and avoiding false precision.
decisions.rationale: Backfill is required for discoverability, but imported sessions need explicit markers because old reports do not always carry provider or exact timestamp metadata.

findings.summary: The Docker MCP memory layer is useful for discovery but is not stable enough to become the canonical memory source.

next_actions.summary: Run the projector with --apply on a host context that can access the Docker MCP gateway end to end.
Update the session-close flow so report.md, daily, sidecar emission, and graph projection happen in that order.
Curate imported sidecars when older session reports can be enriched with exact provider and close timestamp metadata.

commands.result: reported 47 entities and 86 relations across 5 sidecars

commands.action: import historical session reports into JSON sidecars
commands.result: created 4 imported sidecars and skipped the current session because it already had a sidecar

commands.action: project the sidecars into the Docker MCP memory graph
commands.result: first apply created 47 entities and 86 relations
second apply produced 0 new entities, 0 new observations, and 0 new relations

commands.action: reconcile the graph after enriching the canonical session sidecar
commands.result: post-enrichment apply created 2 entities, added 3 observations, and created 4 relations

commands.action: verify final idempotence after the sidecar reconciliation
commands.result: final apply produced 0 new entities, 0 new observations, and 0 new relations with the graph settled at 49 entities and 90 relations

commands.action: reconcile stale managed observations after hardening the projector observation sync
commands.result: cleanup apply deleted 4 stale observations and added 1 consolidated observation while preserving the graph shape at 49 entities and 90 relations

commands.action: confirm final zero-delta convergence after observation cleanup
commands.result: final post-cleanup apply produced 0 new entities, 0 deleted observations, 0 new observations, and 0 new relations
